data.name: Futariuum's Gate
data.detailed_description:
Follow Maya’s transformative, exciting and certainly very lewd journey in Futariuum’s Gate, a stunning, in-depth visual novel and roguelike card battler RPG! Experience how Maya’s life is turned upside down as she takes down demons, gets ahold of what her true purpose is, and learns the value of friendship! And sex. Lots of sex.


🔮Deepen your relationships with characters in Maya’s Sphere and unlock new opportunities for sexy scenes!

🔮100+ hand-drawn sex CGs.

🔮6 animated sex CGs plus variants.

🔮Freely explore Maya’s house and hometown and hang out with characters in.

🔮Manage time, energy and money in the explorable world and day-by-day calendar.

🔮Meet and potentially have encounters with more than 9 sexy and unique characters!

🔮View a gallery containing all of the lewd images you unlock!

🔮Experience a deep deck building card battler roguelike RPG experience.

🔮Explore unique semi-procedurally generated dungeons.

🔮Lots of elemental effects & player/enemy effects. Strategy is key!

🔮Unique card rarity levels.

🔮Card categories: Attack, Block, Skill, Item & Affliction.

🔮30+ special cards with their own unique effects.

🔮An arousing and exciting combat with lots of sexual elements from start to finish…

🔮A range of rewards with each battle, with money, cards, XP and much more!

On one side of Maya’s new life, experience her day-to-day interactions and social exploits. In Maya’s Sphere, see relationships develop in character-specific hangouts and events, which lead to enticing lewd scenes and much more! See more than 90 hand-drawn CGs, linked to each character’s event, and deepen your relationships for further sexy content.

On the other side of Maya’s new life, is her duty as a brand-new Gatekeeper. Maya will need to hunt and defeat demons and send them back to hell. Of course, that comes with its own reward: Sexy encounters with otherworldly beings and supernatural entities! Build your arsenal with cards awarded in the dungeons and from defeating vicious demons, refine them to make them even more powerful and use them in vicious card battles!

And, undoubtedly, the two sides of Maya’s life will collide! Build your relationships to strengthen your cards in battle! Take out demons and advance the story to unlock new and exciting character events! Experience Maya’s sprawling story of duty, friendship and lust!

So, will you take up the mantle of Gatekeeper and save Earth?

data.short_description: Experience stunning hand-drawn erotic scenes, deep writing and thrilling battles in Futariuum’s Gate, a story-focused visual novel, engaging deck-building card battler and roguelike RPG! Follow Maya, a well-hung futanari demon hunter and total slacker as she brings balance to Earth!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or Higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or Higher
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 (AMD equiv.) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2 and/or DirectX 9

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 (AMD equiv.) or better
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2 and/or DirectX 9

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 (AMD equiv.) or better
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2 and/or DirectX 9
